title: SlashBlade: Frostbite Snowbloom
description: This mod adds a series of swords for the SlashBlade based on the cryofloric arts mod.
body:
# **SlashBlade: Frostbite Snowbloom**  
This mod adds several SlashBlades to **cryofloric arts** and provides SlashBlade compatibility for cryofloric arts.

**Added SlashBlades:**  
- Ancient Sword 'Decorated Cloud' Rodai  
- Ancient Sword 'Frosted Stone' Rodai  
- Ancient Sword 'Mirage Snow' Rodai  
  - These blades must be crafted using **Noted -Silver Bamboo Light-**.  
  - They come with **Mirage Edge**, **Light Edge**, and **Tenacious Edge** respectively.  
  - All three also possess **Frost Edge**.

- Nameless Sword 'Puppet' – Mirage  
  - Crafted using wood from **cryofloric arts**.  
  - Has **Mirage Edge** and **Frost Edge**.  
  - When broken, it can be disassembled into **Broken Soul** and cannot normally become a **Demon Sword**.

- Sturdy Sword 'White Sheath'  
  - Crafted using **Soul Fragments** and **Cloud-pattern Ingots**.  
  - Has **Tenacious Edge** and **Frost Edge**.  
  - Cannot normally become a **Demon Sword**.

- Constant Congealed「」  
  - Crafted using various materials from **cryofloric arts**.  
  - Can normally become a **Demon Sword**.

**Added Special Effects (SE):**  
- **Mirage Edge:** Continuously loses durability when inactive; when active, increases Frost Damage by 50%. Cannot be removed or copied. Activation level: 10.  
- **Tenacious Edge:** When active and near breaking, has a chance to grant Strength and restore durability. Cannot be removed or copied. Activation level: 15.  
- **Frost Edge:** Grants Frozen Object enhancement; when active, adds 25% Frost Damage and applies Frost Powder effect. Cannot be removed but can be copied. Activation level: 10.  
- **Light Edge:** Grants Haste when attacking while active. Cannot be removed or copied. Activation level: 15.

**Recipe Changes:**  
- Crafting **Anonymity -Nameless-** using two SlashBlades is now disabled by default.  
- This option can be toggled in the configuration file.

**Planned Updates:**  
More SlashBlades, as well as additional Special Attacks (SA) and Special Effects (SE), will be added in the future.
